title: Auto Shulker Inventory Loader
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that automatically stores items in shulker boxes within your inventory when the main inventory becomes full.
body:
# 📦 Auto Shulker Inventory Loader

**Never worry about a full inventory again!** This lightweight Fabric mod automatically organizes overflow items into shulker boxes in your inventory, keeping your gameplay smooth and uninterrupted.

## ✨ Features

### 🎯 Smart Auto-Storage
- **Automatic overflow handling** - Items automatically transfer to available shulker boxes when your inventory fills up
- **Shift-click support** - Works seamlessly with shift-click operations in containers and chests
- **Intelligent stacking** - Items are efficiently stacked before storage to maximize space
- **Priority system** - Smart logic prioritizes cursor items, then container shulkers, then inventory shulkers

### 🎮 Player-Friendly
- **Zero configuration required** - Works perfectly out of the box
- **Visual & audio feedback** - Optional chat notifications and sound effects when items are auto-stored
- **All shulker variants** - Supports all 17 shulker box colors plus the undyed variant
- **ModMenu integration** - Customize settings through an intuitive in-game config screen 

## ⚙️ Customization

Configure the mod to your preferences:
- Toggle auto-storage on/off
- Enable/disable shift-click storage
- Customize priority system behavior
- Adjust chat notifications and sound effects
- Debug logging for troubleshooting

## 📋 Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.21 - 1.21.11 & 26.x
- **Fabric Loader**: 0.18.3 or higher
- **Fabric API**: Required
- **Java**: 21 or higher
- **ModMenu**: Optional (required for in-game config screen via ClothConfig)

## 🚀 How It Works

1. Your inventory becomes full
2. You pick up items or shift-click from a container
3. The mod automatically finds shulker boxes with available space
4. Overflow items are intelligently stored in the shulker
5. You receive a notification (if enabled)

**No manual intervention needed!** Just play the game while the mod handles your inventory management.

## 💡 Perfect For

- **Miners** - Keep mining without constant inventory trips
- **Builders** - Gather materials efficiently without interruption
- **Explorers** - Loot dungeons and structures without worrying about space
- **Farmers** - Harvest large quantities automatically
- **Everyone** - Anyone who wants smarter inventory management!

## 🔗 Links

- **Issues & Bugs**: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/DennisTheGamer/auto-shulker-inventory/issues)
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/DennisTheGamer/auto-shulker-inventory)
